{"Name":"ORCA Configuration Analyzer Report","Blocks":[{"type":"blank","testId":null,"testCategory":null,"title":"","content":"

Introduction

This Security Configuration Assessment Report provides an executive overview of your organization’s Microsoft Exchange Online and Office 365 security posture, based on analysis performed using the Office 365 Recommended Configuration Analyzer (ORCA).

The purpose of this report is to evaluate the effectiveness of your current email and collaboration security configurations against industry best practices. The assessment focuses on critical protection layers including anti-spam, anti-phishing, anti-malware, Safe Links, Safe Attachments, DKIM, and mail flow (transport) rules, along with other key Exchange Online security controls.

Email remains one of the primary attack vectors for modern threats such as phishing, business email compromise, and malware delivery. As such, properly configured protection mechanisms are essential to safeguarding organizational data and maintaining operational integrity. This report identifies areas where your environment aligns with recommended configurations, as well as gaps that may expose the organization to increased risk.

The insights and recommendations provided are designed to support executive and IT decision-makers in strengthening security controls, improving threat protection, and prioritizing remediation efforts. By aligning your configuration with established best practices, your organization can significantly enhance its resilience against evolving email-based threats and ensure a more secure Microsoft 365 environment.
